commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3fc600ac52dcedfb9d58a16d2c4412ee18574e18)
commands.review_summary:
The PR switches Telegram live previews toward `sendRichMessageDraft`, changes progress draft HTML line breaks, changes durable Telegram text sends to `sendMessage` HTML, and updates the Mantis Telegram workflow secret fallback.

PR surface: Source +162, Tests +67, Config +1. Total +230 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection plus the Bot API contract show the native draft call is invalid, and current-main tests/source show durable rich final sends are being replaced. I did not run a live Telegram session, so the original visual preview symptom still needs real behavior proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author or maintainer revision because the API contract and final-delivery direction must be corrected, and the contributor must provide real Telegram proof before merge.

target.title: fix(telegram): use native rich drafts for live previews
target.body:
## Summary - Use Telegram Bot API native `sendRichMessageDraft` for live Telegram preview drafts when rich messaging is available, keeping interim drafts temporary while final answers remain normal permanent messages. - Keep rich-text rendering through `rich_message` and update compact progress HTML so tool status/detail segments render on separate visible lines instead of collapsing into one dense paragraph. - Wire the Mantis Telegram live workflow to prefer the dedicated Mantis SUT bot secret (`OPENCLAW_QA_TELEGRAM_MANTIS_SUT_BOT_TOKEN`) before falling back to the shared QA Telegram SUT secret. ## Why Telegram Bot API 10.1 added rich message drafts and rich-message editing support. The existing stream preview path used sent/edited rich messages as a fallback preview, which made the temporary draft visible as a normal chat message in some runs. Progress draft lines also placed label, status, and command detail on one HTML line, which made Telegram clients display examples such as `Exec completed; Process ... command ...` as a hard-to-read block. ## Implementation notes - Adds typed `sendRichMessageDraft` support to the Telegram rich raw API wrapper. - Adds a `preferNativeDraft` mode to Telegram draft streams: - preview updates call `sendRichMessageDraft` when available; - finalization clears the native draft instead of materializing it; - legacy send/edit preview behavior remains the fallback when native drafts are unavailable. - Marks native draft streams as temporary so final-answer delivery does not wait for a normal preview message id. - Formats Telegram rich progress HTML with `
` between the tool label and detail/status text, preserving readable line breaks in rich drafts. - Keeps the GitHub Actions bot token value out of the repository; the workflow references a secret only. ## Validation - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/draft-stream.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/lane-delivery.test.ts test/scripts/mantis-telegram-desktop-proof-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/package-acceptance-workflow.test.ts --reporter=dot` - `pnpm tsgo:extensions` - `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` - literal token scan: no committed dedicated bot token literal found ## Risk / rollback - Risk is limited to Telegram streaming preview behavior. If native rich drafts are unavailable, the existing send/edit preview fallback remains active. - Rollback: revert this commit to return Telegram previews to normal rich message send/edit behavior. ## Docs / security - No user-facing docs changed. - No secret values are committed; the workflow consumes the dedicated Mantis bot via GitHub Actions secrets.
target.author: snowzlm

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
